Research Archive

Active Investigations

Applied investigations that feed product decisions, system architecture, and service delivery.

Operational
Intelligence
Research

The research stream supports our commercial work in product strategy, systems audits, AI workflow design, and custom application development. Each investigation links to a live operational question.

TargetPrimary FocusCurrent Notes
Autonomous Dispatch→Coordination Mechanics

Testing LLM-based priority weighting for emergency resource allocation in multi-point crisis scenarios.

Regulatory Extraction→Data Intelligence

Developing zero-shot extraction protocols for international maritime and transport law updates.

Low-Bandwidth Sync→Networking

Engineering mesh-based state synchronization for coordination tools in high-interference environments.

Predictive Aridty Mapping→Environmental Intelligence

Using satellite CV to predict agricultural resource scarcity shifts before they impact market pricing.

Predictive Roof Maintenance→Asset Intelligence

Developing multimodal predictive models to forecast high-cost building maintenance needs and structural failures.

Solving the "Silent" API→Data Intelligence

How we built a busyness index and personalized ranking engine without access to Google’s live popularity data.

The LEARN Launchpad→Product Engineering

How we built LEARN — the Lanchester Early Access Research Network — a unified gateway that ties early-stage app access to user identity, intent, and structured onboarding.

Use Research to Guide the Build

If you are deciding between strategy, audit, or implementation work, the research archive shows how we frame hard technical questions and convert them into operational outcomes.

ServicesCase StudiesMethodologyPartner
